name: identity_rotation_signed_by_old — Ed25519 rotation event signature
note: build_rotate_event_input(old_pub, new_pub, transition_until_ns, recipient_session_id) prefixed by domain tag 'SHAMIR-ROTATE-v1', then signed with the OLD keypair's private key (Ed25519 deterministic). old/new keypairs are reconstructed from fixed seeds. A cross-language impl reproduces signed_by_old bit-exactly; a client verifies it with ed25519_verify_strict(old_pub, rotate_event_input, signed_by_old).
